message:
feat(analytics): add comprehensive GA4 tracking for Learning Hub

- Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID and GA_API_SECRET to Vercel
- Add lesson funnel tracking functions (lesson_view, lesson_complete, lesson_funnel_complete, lesson_funnel_dropoff)
- Create useLessonAnalytics hook for lesson page tracking
- Integrate analytics into lesson-content.tsx (tracks view on mount, completion on button click)
- Add learning_hub_visit event tracking to /learn page
- Store lesson funnel data with UTM params for traffic source attribution

Events tracked:
- lesson_funnel_initiated (with UTM source/medium/campaign)
- lesson_view (per lesson with progress %)
- lesson_complete (with time spent)
- lesson_milestone (learning_started, halfway_point, final_lesson)
- lesson_funnel_complete (when all lessons done)
- lesson_funnel_dropoff (on page exit without completing)
- learning_hub_visit (dashboard page visit)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
